failures.description: The required catalog search tool timed out, so the agent could not retrieve the count needed to answer the user.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The agent understood the user goal and made the correct ProductCatalogSearch call to count available Mechanical Keyboard products. At index 3, the tool returned an explicit infrastructure/connectivity-style error: CatalogServiceTimeoutError, with message that the catalog search dependency timed out after 30000ms. This is not a malformed invocation, guardrail block, or misunderstanding. The later steps do not resolve the timeout or obtain the needed count.
